items.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
items.dek: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.
items.body: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

items.title: Andrew Novak might be the biggest NFL fan on the PGA Tour
items.dek: Novak is getting ready to defend his title at the Zurich Classic, but he'll also be paying close attention to this week's NFL draft.
items.body: Novak is getting ready to defend his title at the Zurich Classic, but he'll also be paying close attention to this week's NFL draft.

items.title: Spring football games: Previewing Indiana, Notre Dame, Penn State and others
